description_long: This object resembles a stylized crustacean, featuring a long, segmented body with a rough, mottled brown exoskeleton. Several elongated, blade-like appendages extend laterally from the main body, giving it a dynamic, almost mechanical appearance. The head region is marked by a green, banded section, possibly representing eyes or sensory organs, and is flanked by two prominent, claw-like structures. Wisps of brown, cloud-like material trail from the body and appendages, suggesting movement or a smoky texture. The overall form is streamlined and angular, with sharp, black elements contrasting against the organic brown. The object appears both natural and abstract, blending biological and synthetic visual cues.
description: A stylized, segmented crustacean with a rough brown exoskeleton, black blade-like appendages, and green banded head features. Wispy brown trails and sharp, angular elements give it a dynamic, abstract look.
description_view_0: The head and green banded features are most prominent, with claws and black appendages clearly visible extending outward.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizes the length of the body and the layered, blade-like appendages, with the brown wispy trails more apparent.
description_view_2: The opposite side view highlights the segmentation and the trailing brown material, with less visibility of the head details.
description_view_3: A rear-angled view showing the tapering body, trailing wisps, and the angular arrangement of the appendages, with the head partially obscured.
